title: 菊花賞の後に・“お人形”

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold City finishes the Kikuka Sho, and finally she
hears praise for her strength.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, she later sees comments on an
anonymous message board of people discussing
her appearance.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tosen Jordan sheds tears out of frustration, while
Gold City remains stunned by her unchanged
reputation.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's almost ready to give up, but I assure her
that change will come, although gradually. I
suggest she take on the Arima Kinen next.
